textPlain: I interviewed Rob Sherman the gent behind Southernamis and other Atari BBS's on my podcast a few months ago.  He's running emulated Atari 8-bit systems in AWS for these BBS's.  Rob also has written some articles on telnet-access retro BBS's in the newly revived Compute's Gazette magazine.Visiting BBS's that run on actual or emulated hardware can be a nice trip down memory lane for those who were part of the 8-bit BBS community in times past.
